title: News Filter
author: Educational_Bet_5474
selftext:
So when i created my first EA i wanted to apply it to FTMO prop challenge. I got FTMO Swing so i could trade without shutting it down while news are coming, but quickly found out i’m suffering from lowered 1:20 (for metals) leverage. And now there is two ways:
1. Keep suffering getting breadcrumbs using swing;
2. Make a news filter that won’t allow EA trade 2 minutes before/after news.
Did you guys somehow done something like this before?

comments.author: user_alpha231
comments.body: I’d block trades around red news. Much safer than fighting reduced leverage.
